name: Genasi (Earth)
sourceBook: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
summary: Tracing their ancestry to the genies of the Elemental Planes, each genasi can tap into the power of one of the elements. Air, earth, fire, and water — these are the four pillars of the Material Plane and the four types of genasi. Some genasi are direct descendants of a genie, while others were born to non-genasi parents who lived near a place suffused by a genie’s magic.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: When determining your character’s ability scores, increase one score by 2 and increase a different score by 1, or increase three different scores by 1. You can't raise any of your scores above 20.

stats.label: Size
stats.value: You are Medium or Small. You choose the size when you select this race.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: Your character can speak, read, and write Common and one other language that you and your DM agree is appropriate for the character. The Player’s Handbook offers a list of languages to choose from. The DM is free to modify that list for a campaign.

coreTraits.name: Darkvision
coreTraits.summary: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light and in darkness as if it were dim light. You discern colors in that darkness only as shades of gray.

coreTraits.name: Earth Walk
coreTraits.summary: You can move across difficult terrain without expending extra movement if you are using your walking speed on the ground or a floor.

coreTraits.name: Starting at 5th level, you can cast the Pass Without Trace spell with this trait, without requiring a material component
coreTraits.summary: Once you cast that spell with this trait, you can’t do so again until you finish a long rest. You can also cast it using any spell slots you have of 2nd level or higher.

notes: source isolated from page-content and table of contents
